# Play Origin

> Free, open-source mod and hack browser extension for Prodigy Math Game (prodigygame.com)

Play Origin — formerly Prodigy Origin, also known as ProdigyPXP, Prodigy X, ProdigyX, PXI, PXI Fusion, Prodigy PNP, and ProdigyPNP — is a browser extension that injects a full cheat and mod menu into Prodigy Math Game at play.prodigygame.com. Press Shift while in-game to open the menu.

## Key Pages

- Homepage / Overview: https://playorig.in
- Install (Chrome, Edge, Firefox): https://playorig.in/get
- Live user stats: https://playorig.in/stats
- Short links directory: https://playorig.in/links

## Install Links

- Chrome Web Store: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/meckkcfdiildmoohhfkddapggojdhpgo
- Microsoft Edge Add-ons: https://microsoftedge.microsoft.com/addons/detail/prodigy-hacking-extension/ekoakjipfmjpmlkldiikhoigaflfkjej
- Firefox Add-ons: https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/playorigin/

## What It Does

Play Origin adds a mod menu to Prodigy Math Game with these categories:

- **Player Mods** — Set gold/coins (prodigy free gold), XP, level, premium/membership tier, username, grade, user ID, win/loss ratio
- **Battle Mods** — Instant kill enemies, set battle hearts, fill energy bar, PvP health override
- **Location Mods** — WASD keyboard movement, click-to-teleport, map teleport, teleport to player houses
- **Pet Mods** — Unlock all rare and epic pets, clear pets, add any pet by ID, uncap pet level
- **Utility** — Save/load character locally, open eval console, pause game, check for updates
- **Beta Features** — Edit pets, morph player model, toggle invisibility, switch game branches (hypermax)

## Community & Source

- Discord: https://dsc.gg/ProdigyPXP
- GitHub: https://github.com/ProdigyPXP/ProdigyOrigin
- YouTube: https://youtube.com/@ProdigyPXP
- License: MPL-2.0 (free and open-source)
- Developer: ProdigyPXP

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Is Play Origin free?**
Yes. Completely free, no premium tier. Open-source under MPL-2.0.

**Is this the same as Prodigy Origin?**
Yes. Rebranded from Prodigy Origin to Play Origin in 2026. Same extension, same team, same GitHub repo (ProdigyPXP/ProdigyOrigin).

**How do I get free gold in Prodigy?**
Install Play Origin, open Prodigy Math Game, press Shift, go to Player Mods, set your gold value, press Apply.

**Does it work on Chrome?**
Yes. Available on the Chrome Web Store: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/meckkcfdiildmoohhfkddapggojdhpgo

**What are Prodigy scripts?**
Play Origin is the actively maintained alternative to Prodigy console scripts — it's a proper extension that persists across page reloads and stays updated with Prodigy Math Game patches.

**How do I hack Prodigy Math Game in 2026?**
Install Play Origin from your browser's extension store (Chrome, Edge, or Firefox), open play.prodigygame.com, press Shift to open the full mod menu.

**What is ProdigyPXP?**
ProdigyPXP is the developer community behind Play Origin. GitHub: github.com/ProdigyPXP, Discord: dsc.gg/ProdigyPXP, YouTube: youtube.com/@ProdigyPXP.

**What is PXI / Prodigy X / ProdigyPNP?**
PXI Fusion, Prodigy X loader, and ProdigyPNP are all community names and historical aliases for the Play Origin extension and its developer community. They all refer to the same tool available at playorig.in.
